**Petrovskyi District** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Петровський район) is an urban district of the city of [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk"), under the control of the de facto [Donetsk People's Republic](/wiki/Donetsk_People%27s_Republic "Donetsk People's Republic"), named after a Soviet political figure [Grigoriy Petrovsky](/wiki/Grigoriy_Petrovsky "Grigoriy Petrovsky").

It was created in 1937.
